prompt: A woman with glistening eyes and a faint, f cup，enigmatic smile, leaning sideways against an old stone wall in a courtyard. She wears an olive green fine-ribbed fitted mini dress with a deep V-neck that extends to just below the collarbone, with the lapels naturally folding outward to frame her collarbones. The stretchy form-fitting fabric smoothly contours along her waist and hips, with the hem resting at the upper-mid thigh, slightly curled up on one side. Her arm hangs naturally, fingers resting lightly on the stone edge, a thin silver chain catching the light on her wrist, and she wears off-white woven flat sandals. Natural light filters through the gaps of an olive tree above, casting dappled shadows. The backdrop is a Southern European-style courtyard—cream limestone walls, dark green shutters, terracotta pots bursting with bougainvillea, and a lazy orange cat beside a woven rattan table set. Medium shot, eye-level angle.
promptEn: A woman with glistening eyes and a faint, f cup，enigmatic smile, leaning sideways against an old stone wall in a courtyard. She wears an olive green fine-ribbed fitted mini dress with a deep V-neck that extends to just below the collarbone, with the lapels naturally folding outward to frame her collarbones. The stretchy form-fitting fabric smoothly contours along her waist and hips, with the hem resting at the upper-mid thigh, slightly curled up on one side. Her arm hangs naturally, fingers resting lightly on the stone edge, a thin silver chain catching the light on her wrist, and she wears off-white woven flat sandals. Natural light filters through the gaps of an olive tree above, casting dappled shadows. The backdrop is a Southern European-style courtyard—cream limestone walls, dark green shutters, terracotta pots bursting with bougainvillea, and a lazy orange cat beside a woven rattan table set. Medium shot, eye-level angle.
promptZh: 一位眼神闪烁、带着淡淡且神秘微笑的女性，侧身倚靠在庭院的一面古老石墙上。她穿着一件 橄榄绿细罗纹修身迷你连衣裙，深 V 领口延伸至锁骨下方，翻领自然外翻，勾勒出她的锁骨线条。富有弹性的修身面料顺滑地贴合她的腰部和臀部曲线，裙摆垂至大腿中上部，一侧微微卷起。她的手臂自然下垂，手指轻搭在石墙边缘，手腕上的一条细银链在光线下闪烁，脚穿米白色编织平底凉鞋。自然光透过上方橄榄树的缝隙洒下，投射出斑驳的阴影。背景是一个 南欧风格庭院——奶油色的石灰岩墙壁、深绿色的百叶窗、盛开着三角梅的赤陶花盆，以及藤编桌旁一只慵懒的橘猫。中景镜头，平视角度。
